title: thelypteris arthurii
intro: Thelypteris arthurii is a species of fern belonging to the family Thelypteridaceae, native to India, and is also known as the Arthur's maiden fern. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits associated with Thelypteris arthurii include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and treat skin conditions. In herbal preparations, the leaves of this plant can be used to make tea or infusions, and it may also be used in traditional remedies in the form of decoctions or powder.
